description_long: This is a three-seater wooden sofa with a robust, reddish-brown frame featuring decorative side panels and openwork geometric motifs. The seat consists of a single, thick, gray cushion that spans the entire width, providing a continuous sitting surface. Five large, loose back cushions in a muted gray color are arranged along the backrest, offering plush support and a soft contrast to the wooden structure. The armrests are gently curved, with vertical wooden slats and carved details, adding an elegant touch to the overall design. The back of the sofa is characterized by a solid wooden frame with inset panels and visible cushion backs, emphasizing its sturdy construction. This piece combines traditional craftsmanship with modern comfort, making it suitable for urban parks, public seating areas, or upscale outdoor lounges.
description: A sturdy wooden sofa with a reddish-brown frame, gray seat cushion, and five plush gray back cushions. Decorative side panels and curved armrests add elegance to its robust design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full width of the sofa, highlighting the five gray back cushions, single seat cushion, and detailed armrests.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the sofa's depth, the thickness of the seat cushion, and the curved, openwork armrest design.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the solid wooden back frame with inset panels and the backs of the five cushions, emphasizing structural support.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the other side, showing the armrest's curve, decorative panel, and cushion depth.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Five large, loose back cushions in a single row and one continuous seat cushion; all cushions are uniform in size and not attached.
attribute_armrest_style: Present on both sides, the armrests are medium height, gently curved with openwork vertical slats and decorative carved panels, made of wood without visible padding.
attribute_leg_design: Four block-style wooden legs integrated into the frame at each corner, with a sled-like base for added stability and a visible wooden texture.
attribute_backrest_type: High, straight, continuous wooden backrest with five loose, uniform cushions placed against it; no tufting or channeling visible.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Upholstery is solid gray with a smooth, matte texture; no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
